reviews.comment:
La semana pasada, mi marido fue a cargar nafta. A las horas la camioneta presentó fallas y dejo de funcionar. Días en el taller. Cuestión, que, tenia mezclado gasoil. Supuestamente, nos tomaron el reclamo en la estación de servicio. Vemos como sigue la historia. Porque nos fuimos enterando entre vecinos, que también tuvieron algún inconveniente de este tipo.

(Translated by Google)
Last week, my husband went to fill up with gas. A few hours later, the truck malfunctioned and stopped working. It spent days in the shop. It turns out it had diesel mixed in it. Supposedly, they took our complaint at the gas station. We'll see how this goes, because we've heard from neighbors that they've also had similar problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKMzZ6NWd3RRAB
